news.title: What’s next in the search for a new U-M president?
news.summary_en: As U-M’s president-elect steps aside for health reasons, the university has options for finding a new leader who will face numerous challenges.
news.author: Kim Kozlowski
news.original_title: What’s next in the search for a new U-M president?
news.summary_cn: As U-M’s president-elect steps aside for health reasons, the university has options for finding a new leader who will face numerous challenges.

news.title: Should Michigan follow Mississippi and retain 3rd graders to boost literacy?
news.summary_en: As leaders discuss ways to improve Michigan test scores, the state of Mississippi repeatedly comes up. Mississippi’s former state literacy director shares ideas on what Michigan can do.
news.author: Isabel Lohman
news.original_title: Should Michigan follow Mississippi and retain 3rd graders to boost literacy?
news.summary_cn: As leaders discuss ways to improve Michigan test scores, the state of Mississippi repeatedly comes up. Mississippi’s former state literacy director shares ideas on what Michigan can do.

news.title: U-M President-elect Kent Syverud announces cancer diagnosis, will not take office
news.summary_en: The University of Michigan will begin another presidential search after President-elect Kent Syverud was diagnosed with brain cancer.
news.author: Kim Kozlowski
news.original_title: U-M President-elect Kent Syverud announces cancer diagnosis, will not take office
news.summary_cn: The University of Michigan will begin another presidential search after President-elect Kent Syverud was diagnosed with brain cancer.
